title: file symlink and file link: create symbolic and hard links
desc: wkappbot file symlink <target> <linkname> creates a symbolic link for files or directories. wkappbot file link <target> <linkname> creates a hard link (files only, same volume). Both commands require the link path to not already exist.
steps: Use 'wkappbot file symlink <target> <linkname>' to create a symbolic link. Works for both files and directories. Requires SeCreateSymbolicLinkPrivilege (developer mode or admin).
Use 'wkappbot file link <target> <linkname>' to create a hard link. Files only, same drive. Unlike symlinks, hard links survive target deletion.
Both commands print the created link path on success. They fail if <linkname> already exists. Use 'wkappbot file glob' to verify before creating.
author: claude
